title: Polygonum lapidosum
taxonomy: Polygonum lapidosum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. This family is commonly known as buckwheat or smartweed family. Polygonum lapidosum is further classified as a member of the genus Polygonum, which contains various species of knotweeds and smartweeds. The classification of Polygonum lapidosum places it within the order Polygonales, which comprises plants with similar characteristics to those of buckwheat and knotweed. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Polygonum lapidosum within the plant kingdom.

intro: Polygonum lapidosum, also known as Scandix pecten-veneris or Rockmeadow Scandion, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae.
